news.headline: Rio Tinto donates A$1 million to aid Cyclone Alfred recovery in Queensland and New South Wales.
news.summary: In Melbourne, Rio Tinto has pledged a donation of A$1 million to the Australian Red Cross, an approved agency of the Queensland Government, in response to Tropical Cyclone Alfred. The funds are designated to offer emergency relief, aid in recovery efforts, and deliver long-term support services for communities in Queensland and Northern New South Wales affected by the cyclone. Rio Tinto's Chief Executive in Australia, Kellie Parker, expressed the significance of this support stating, “The effects of Tropical Cyclone Alfred are deeply personal to us, as one of...".

news.headline: Vermont decides to drop the case against Coinbase. Coinbase CLO encourages Congress to act on crypto legislation.
news.summary: Paul Grewal, Chief Legal Officer at Coinbase, is encouraging Congress to seize the opportunity of bipartisan support for comprehensive cryptocurrency legislation.

Coway's NOBLE 2.0 Air Purifier wins iF Design Award for 2025, marking their 18th honor in a row.
news.summary: SEOUL, South Korea - Coway has proudly received recognition from the iF International Forum for its NOBLE 2.0 Air Purifier Series due to its advanced design and cutting-edge air purification technologies. news.headline: Singapore-based eco-packaging manufacturer, Green Lab, introduced eco-friendly packaging solutions in the US at cost parity.
news.summary: A prominent sustainability leader from Singapore, Green Lab, has introduced certified environmentally friendly packaging to the retail and foodservice sectors in the United States starting on March 14, 2025. As a subsidiary of Frasers &, Green Lab is a reputable eco-packaging producer in Southeast Asia. Their foray into the American market signifies a significant expansion, bringing their expertise and commitment to sustainability to a new audience. This move is poised to influence the adoption of greener practices in the industry.

news.headline: Palace Museum in Beijing preserves China's 5,000-year-old civilization and culture, serving as a bridge between civilizations.
news.summary: In Beijing on March 14, 2025, the renowned Palace Museum, formerly known as the Forbidden City, stands as a crucial guardian of China's rich 5,000-year history and traditional culture. This institution serves as a vital repository, showcasing the heritage and essence of Chinese civilization. Its significance is underscored by its role in preserving and promoting the cultural legacy that spans millennia.

news.summary: Exports from China to emerging markets have experienced a significant increase, providing alternative pathways to reach the U.S. market. Authorities in Beijing are concerned that these routes could face potential closure due to the influence of President Trump.

news.summary: Kioxia, based in Tokyo, has recently unveiled a cutting-edge enterprise SSD designed for AI applications. This innovative storage solution boasts an impressive capacity of 122.88 terabytes and harnesses the power of Kioxia's 2 terabit QLC die technology.

news.headline: Bunker Hill Mining Corp amends vesting schedule for 3,891,096 RSUs, now vest on May 1, 2025 instead of March 13/March 31.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on March 13, 2025, Bunker Hill Mining Corp. disclosed changes to their restricted stock unit (RSU) vesting schedule. The Board of Directors approved an amendment for certain RSUs granted to directors and officers under the RSU Plan. A total of 3,891,096 RSUs from Prior Grants in November 2, 2022, July 4, 2023, and March 13, 2024, will now vest on May 1, 2025, instead of the previous dates of March 13, 2025, or March 31, 2025. The amendment applies only to the vesting date, with all other RSU terms remaining unchanged.

This innovative approach has led to a significant increase in collaborative projects, with a noticeable rise in data breaches reduced by 30% last year. news.headline: TRADLINX study shows B/L tracking offers 99.5% accuracy, 537.8% cost savings over container-based systems.
news.summary: A recent study by TRADLINX has revealed that tracking bill of lading (B/L) in global supply chains achieves an impressive 99.5% accuracy rate. This method also demonstrates a substantial cost reduction of 537.8% compared to container-based systems, leading to enhanced operational efficiency. The findings, released from Seoul, South Korea on March 13, 2025, highlight the significant benefits of utilizing B/L tracking technology for businesses operating in complex international trade environments.

news.headline: Len Forkas plans to climb Mount Everest to raise $1 million for Hopecam, connecting sick children to their classrooms.
news.summary: Entrepreneur and endurance athlete Len Forkas, who founded the non-profit organization Hopecam, has announced a goal to raise $1 million in April 2025. Hopecam aims to connect children battling illness with their classrooms. Forkas plans to kick off this fundraising initiative by embarking on a challenging climb. The goal is to provide support and assistance to sick children, ensuring they can stay connected with their education despite being away from school due to their health conditions.

news.summary: Geisel Software, a leading innovator in AI, machine learning, computer vision, and robotics based in Worcester, Mass., introduced Symage. This cutting-edge synthetic image data generator aims to revolutionize AI training. The launch took place on March 13, 2025.

news.headline: Daawat partners with Shah Rukh Khan as brand ambassador for Basmati rice in North America. - LT Foods.
news.summary: LT Foods, a prominent global FMCG enterprise in the consumer food sector, is thrilled to share a major achievement in providing top-notch Basmati rice to customers in North America. The company, headquartered in CYPRESS, Calif., revealed this exciting news on March 13, 2025. This milestone signifies the successful delivery of premium-quality Basmati rice to a large consumer base in the region, highlighting the company's dedication to excellence in the food industry.

news.summary: LiveArt has launched the inaugural AI-Native Market Intelligence Engine for art and digital assets, offering real-time insights, predictive analytics, and customized strategies at zero cost. The platform, based in New York, was unveiled on March 13, 2025. This cutting-edge technology aims to transform the art market by providing invaluable data and tools to users.

ElevenLabs' AI platform now compliant with HIPAA, ensuring secure patient interactions in digital healthcare.
news.summary: The Conversational AI platform developed by ElevenLabs has recently attained compliance with HIPAA standards. This accomplishment helps guarantee the security of patient interactions and confidentiality of data within the digital healthcare realm.

news.headline: Chainalysis enhances DeFi capabilities by integrating with Ink, Kraken's Ethereum layer 2, offering automatic token support.
news.summary: In a recent development, Chainalysis has partnered with Ink, a DeFi-focused Ethereum layer 2 platform created by Kraken. This integration aims to bolster compliance and investigative processes by introducing automatic token support and advanced transaction monitoring capabilities. This collaboration is expected to streamline operations and enhance visibility for users.

news.headline: Integer Holdings Corp upsizes Convertible Notes offering to $875 million, from $750 million, at 1.875% due 2030.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Integer Holdings Corporation revealed the pricing of an offering for $875.0 million aggregate principal amount of 1.875% convertible senior notes due 2030 (NYSE: ITGR). This offering represents an increase from the initial plans of $750.0 million for the Convertible Notes.

news.headline: Korean investors flock to US leveraged ETFs amidst tech stocks fall.
Democrat lawmaker criticizes Trump's Bitcoin reserve plan, citing conflicts of interest. Calls for Treasury to halt it. #Cryptocurrency #Bitcoin #Trump
news.summary: House Representative Gerald E. Connolly criticized the US Treasury's plan to create a strategic crypto reserve, accusing President Trump of conflict of interest. He stated in a letter to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent that the reserve would not benefit the American people and enrich Trump and his donors, calling it unsound fiscal policy. The White House clarified that the reserve would only hold forfeited crypto. Connolly alleged conflicts of interest with Trump's ownership of the crypto platform World Liberty Financial and the Trump memecoin, TRUMP. He requested documents related to the creation of the reserve and steps taken to avoid conflicts of interest. The reserve will use forfeited crypto and include other cryptocurrencies like XRP, Solana, Cardano, and Ether. Representative Maxine Waters also criticized the Trump memecoin as a "money grab."

news.headline: Solana's proposal to reduce inflation by up to 80% fails, with 74% staked supply voting. Approval fell short at 61.4%. Supporters praise governance process as a success.
news.summary: A proposal to change Solana's inflation system was rejected by stakeholders with only 43.6% in favor, falling short of the required 66.67%. The vote saw around 74% of the staked supply participating across 910 validators. The proposal, SIMD-228, aimed to shift from a fixed to a dynamic inflation model based on staking levels, with estimates suggesting an 80% reduction in inflation. Currently, Solana's inflation is at 4.66% with only 3% of the total supply staked. The proposed system aimed to adjust inflation to stabilize the network and encourage DeFi use. However, concerns were raised over complexity, smaller validators' profitability, and potential instability from fluctuating staking rates. Despite the rejection, stakeholders praised the governance process as a success, highlighting the significant participation and market cap involved. Solana's price saw a minimal dip of 1.5%, trading just below $125, as the network currently faces challenges following the burst of the memecoin bubble, leading to a 60% price decline in two months.

news.headline: Wall Street analysts revise Gogo's price expectations ahead of Q4 earnings release on March 14. Earnings estimated at 9 cents per share with projected revenue of $97.8 million. Gogo's acquisition of Satcom Direct completed on Dec. 4, 2024. Gogo shares closed at $6.87, down 1.2% on Thursday.
news.summary: Before the market opens on Friday, March 14, Gogo Inc. (NASDAQ:GOGO) is set to announce its fourth-quarter financial results. Analysts are anticipating earnings of 9 cents per share, a decline from the 11 cents per share reported in the same quarter last year. The company, based in Broomfield, Colorado, is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of $97.8 million, slightly lower than the $97.81 million recorded in the previous year. Gogo recently finalized its acquisition of Satcom Direct on Dec. 4, 2024, and appointed Chris Moore, the President of SD, as the new CEO. Following this news, Gogo's stock closed at $6.87 on Thursday, down by 1.2%. For more details, interested individuals can refer to Benzinga.com.

Wuhan launches "AI+" initiative, offering single projects up to 20 million yuan in funding to boost industry development.
news.summary: In Wuhan, China, on March 13, 2025, the Information Office of Wuhan Municipal People's Government conducted a press conference to announce policy measures aimed at boosting the artificial intelligence (AI) sector in the city. news.headline: IEHP, California Community College system, and SBCCD partner to provide health care access for eligible students in Rancho Cucamonga.

news.summary: The recent release of NVIDIA's NCCL 2.24 brings enhancements for multi-GPU and multinode communication. The update includes new features such as the RAS subsystem, NIC Fusion, and support for FP8. These enhancements are designed to improve deep learning training efficiency.

news.headline: Bitcoin's value drops, standing at a critical point amidst economic uncertainties; Positive news from White House boosts optimism.
news.summary: The current state of Bitcoin is crucial as it reaches a turning point amidst ongoing macro uncertainties. Despite this, there is a continuous stream of optimistic news originating from the White House. The importance of this moment is underscored by the fluctuating value of Bitcoin, standing at approximately [current Bitcoin value] amidst economic volatility and global unpredictability.
